name: ASA Gets A Little "FREAKY"... Or Is It HER?
description:
𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚋𝚎𝚏𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎 "𝙵𝙴𝙼𝙲𝙴𝙻" 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚢𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚎𝚜 𝚊𝚜 𝚊 𝚠𝚎𝚒𝚛𝚍𝚘. 𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚛𝚞𝚖𝚘𝚛𝚜 𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚜 "𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝚞𝚝𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚕𝚢 𝚍𝚒𝚏𝚏𝚎𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚝" 𝚒𝚗𝚜𝚒𝚍𝚎, 𝚢𝚘𝚞’𝚛𝚎 𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚌𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚢𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐. 𝙳𝚒𝚍 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚕𝚢 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚑𝚎𝚛... 𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚎 "𝙾𝚃𝙷𝙴𝚁 𝙾𝙽𝙴" 𝚕𝚞𝚛𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗...?

Chainsaw Man Part 2 in a nutshell.

Heya, Boneheads!!!

How was your Christmas? Did you get some phat cheeks as a gift? If not, don't worry, Uncle SANS is here for that.

Of course, this bot wasn't actually made for Christmas. I'm already working ON ONE for that and I'll most likely upload it on New Year's, which, well, it only a week away, right? Nobody's going to notice...

But, I also mentioned in the previous bot that I wanted to bring you a Yoru bot this week, and here it is.

I mean, I already have an Asa bot, so why not make a bot of this other freaky bitch, right?

And let's not kid ourselves, people. It's OBVIOUS that Asa's ass gets fatter when Yoru takes control of the body. Or do you think it's just a coincidence that my GOAT Fujimoto draws so many panels from behind when Yoru appears?

USE YOUR SKULL, BONEHEADS!!!

I'll leave it at that, eh. Everyone can believe what they want.

I'm just a skeleton who likes big butts.

But yeah, it was about time I uploaded a new Chainsaw Man bot. Maybe I'll upload one of Kobeni or Power soon? Which one would you like?

Enjoy, Boneheads.

Ciao.
